title: SQL query with PHP variable interpolation in double-quoted string
description: A double-quoted SQL string contains embedded $variable or {$variable} syntax, which PHP interpolates directly into the query.
explanation: PHP interpolates variables inside double-quoted strings before the query reaches the database. This is functionally identical to concatenation-based injection.
fix: Switch to single-quoted strings with ? placeholders. Concatenate only CMS_DB_PREFIX.
